search_document:
User Request: Share india economy dashboard 

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Revenue by Region
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across different regions
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue
Title: Top Products
Type: table
Description: Best-selling products
Title: Order Trends
Type: chart
Description: Trends in order volume over time
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of customers by type

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipRegion, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipRegion ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID

sql_queries.title: Top Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM Products p JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Order Trends
sql_queries.description: Trends in order volume over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM CustomerDemographics cd JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ccd ON cd.CustomerTypeID = ccd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY cd.CustomerDesc ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC
